creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Created attachment 251987
Patch to 2.15.0 including dependency updates

Good evening,

I've updated my diff with the deps updated and portrevisions bumped for the following ports:

www/py-horizon www/py-woob x11/screenkey www/trac www/py-flask-security www/py-flask-babelex www/py-enmerkar textproc/py-wtforms textproc/py-sphinx-intl textproc/py-sphinx textproc/py-pydata-sphinx-theme textproc/py-mkdocs-material textproc/py-mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin textproc/py-mkdocs textproc/py-mako textproc/py-docxcompose textproc/py-agate net-im/py-apprise math/sage graphics/rapid-photo-downloader finance/odoo16 finance/odoo15 finance/odoo14 finance/odoo finance/fava devel/py-os-win devel/py-nbclassic devel/py-jupyterlab-server devel/py-flask-babel devel/py-Jinja2 deskutils/normcap astro/kosmorro

The only ports that depend on py-babel that I did not touch were math/sage and www/py-lektor as both are currently BROKEN

I'm also setting up a pourdriere build for them, but that'll probably take some time.

Thanks,
Nick
